updates.title: VoidAI Pedro - The Foundation
updates.description: First public alpha release with multi-model chat capabilities and few core Void assistant features.
features: 400+ AI models including major providers such as, GPT-5.2, Claude 4.5, Grok 4.1, Mistral, Llama 4, Qwen, Deepseek, and Gemini

updates.title: Language Support Update
updates.description: Added support for 47 languages with persistent language selection in Explore settings.
features: Language selection in Explore to Language settings

updates.title: Introducing VoidAI Spaces
updates.description: Alpha release of Spaces - AI-augmented workspaces where users can collaborate with VoidAI in dedicated environments.

updates.title: VoidAI Accounts
updates.description: User accounts system with persistent history and preferences (some saving issues exist, will be fixed in Feb 30).

updates.title: VoidAI Apps and Agents
updates.description: Extend VoidAI with powerful apps and intelligent agents that VoidAI orchestrates for extended capabilities.
features: Install apps to add new functionality
Unified app marketplace for easy discovery
